subcodes.first_line: The Herald of God hath proclaimed from the right hand of the Throne: Those who have attained on this day unto that which the Best-Beloved hath willed, these indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اذن موذن الله عن یمین العرش ان الذین فازوا الیوم بما اراده المحبوب اولئک
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Greatest Name, @consolation and comfort
